violations.text: Bagged bagels were donated from a local food establishment without ingredient label to be given out to pantry guests. PIC discarded bagels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the storage area, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2021
